\vspace{0.5em}
\begin{minipage}{0.96\linewidth}
\footnotesize
Notes: FM-OLS is the main estimator; IM-OLS is a robustness check; DOLS is a fragility/stress check. S31 exports S30 estimates for human adjudication and does not reconstruct theta\_tot, productive capacity, or utilization. The current US A03 estimates are Tier-B ME/NRC composition-proxy escalation specifications. They are not direct NFCorp-by-asset-type ME/NRC estimates and do not identify the preferred asymmetric NRC-envelope / ME-distribution mechanism.
\end{minipage}
\end{table}
